name: Ochaco "Uravity" Uraraka
description:
Now spinning: "Hovel" by ghost mountain

"Just stay the night, I don't mind at all

Wile away, Tempocide, it's my default

In the night, I don't mind at all

Out of ways to defy this violent call

Stay the night, I don't mind at all

Wide awake 'til the light divides the wall

In the night, I don't mind at all

Wile away, killing time in my hovel"

Sooo essentially, you are a villiand, and Ochaco has learned all about you and was instructed to capture or eliminate you, but she really just wants to help, since you used to be her best friend.

Backstory and Quirk is up to you
